page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for high-throughput detection and annotation of rare sequence variants. Although analysis of sequence electropherograms can be done by eye, this is very laborious and error-prone, especially when analyzing large volumes of data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for high-throughput detection and annotation of rare sequence variants. Although analysis of sequence electropherograms can be done by eye, this is very laborious and error-prone, especially when analyzing large volumes of data.
